This report explains GitClaw's current execution boundary. It reports policy, workflow, tool, and skill metadata only; issue bodies, comments, prompts, workflow bodies, tool output bodies, and secrets are not included.

### Execution Boundary
- agent_runtime=`GitHub Actions job`
- model_runtime=`GitHub Models or configured OpenAI-compatible endpoint`
- shell_tool=`absent`
- file_write_tool=`absent`
- pull_request_tool=`absent`
- backup_writer=`separate backup job after successful handle`

### Tool Contracts
- name=`gitclaw.list_files` mode=`read-only` mutating=`false` enabled=`true` disabled_by_config=`false` blocked_by_allowlist=`false` trigger=`always`
- name=`gitclaw.search_files` mode=`read-only` mutating=`false` enabled=`true` disabled_by_config=`false` blocked_by_allowlist=`false` trigger=`explicit quoted phrase or identifier`
- name=`gitclaw.read_file` mode=`read-only` mutating=`false` enabled=`true` disabled_by_config=`false` blocked_by_allowlist=`false` trigger=`explicit repository-relative path`
- name=`gitclaw.skill_index` mode=`metadata-only` mutating=`false` enabled=`true` disabled_by_config=`false` blocked_by_allowlist=`false` trigger=`local skills exist`
- name=`gitclaw.policy` mode=`metadata-only` mutating=`false` enabled=`true` disabled_by_config=`false` blocked_by_allowlist=`false` trigger=`write intent detected`

### Active Tool Outputs
- name=`gitclaw.list_files` input_sha256_12=`cdb4ee2aea69` output_bytes=`7009` output_lines=`194` output_sha256_12=`0ad6a5b82ff7`
- name=`gitclaw.skill_index` input_sha256_12=`79798d7bfe09` output_bytes=`393` output_lines=`1` output_sha256_12=`0093441f953b`
- name=`gitclaw.search_files` input_sha256_12=`bf5f28e5f523` output_bytes=`1152` output_lines=`14` output_sha256_12=`758cff038366`

### Workflow Permission Boundary
- job=`backup` present=`true` expected=`contents:write, issues:read` actual=`contents:write, issues:read` unexpected_write=`none`
- job=`handle` present=`true` expected=`contents:read, issues:write, models:read` actual=`contents:read, issues:write, models:read` unexpected_write=`none`
- job=`preflight` present=`true` expected=`contents:read, issues:read` actual=`contents:read, issues:read` unexpected_write=`none`

### Sandbox Notes
- host exec is denied because no shell/exec tool is exposed in GitClaw v1
- tool outputs are deterministic prompt inputs, not arbitrary process execution
- future host exec support must add explicit allowlists, approval storage, hard blocklists, and body-free audit cards before enabling execution
